'''''Star Wars Adventures 9: Capture Arawynne''''' was the ninth installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. This book is a reprint of ''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]''. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 9|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 9]] in [[June]] [[2003]].
